tweet: While Congress has fought over some things, we've also worked in a bipartisan way to get the people's work done. It’s a record of results that’s making our country stronger and more prosperous, and I hope you’ll share it with your friends if they ask: “what has Congress done?”

name: Rep. Kay Granger
tweet: CONSERVATIVE JUDGES: The Senate has confirmed President Trump’s judicial nominees at a historic pace: 84 total, including 29 circuit judges, 53 district court judges, and Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch to the Supreme Court.

name: Rep. Kay Granger
tweet: OBAMACARE RELIEF: Repealed the individual mandate tax that forced Americans to buy something many didn’t want or couldn’t afford, and ended IPAB.

name: Rep. Kay Granger
tweet: BANKING REFORM: Provided Main Street borrowers and lenders relief from burdensome Dodd-Frank red tape for the first time.

name: Rep. Kay Granger
tweet: ENERGY: Opened Arctic National Wildlife Refuge (ANWR), one of the largest untapped conventional oilfields in North America, to help keep energy affordable.

name: Rep. Kay Granger
tweet: MILITARY FUNDING: After many years of neglecting our national security, our troop readiness, and the critical maintenance of our defense infrastructure, we’ve provided record funding to @DeptofDefense, including the largest pay increase in nine years.

name: Rep. Kay Granger
tweet: TAX REFORM: Reformed America’s tax code for the first time in 31 years, putting more money in the pockets of American families and creating more opportunity for them and their children.

name: Rep. Kay Granger
tweet: PREVENTING MASS SHOOTINGS: Enacted Fix NICS and STOP School Violence Act to help protect the American people from mass shootings and fix the broken background check system.

name: Rep. Kay Granger
tweet: OPIOID LEGISLATION: Combating the nation’s worst public health crisis with a package of proposals to fight a widespread epidemic, including stopping fentanyl at the border and spurring development of new non-addictive painkillers.

name: Rep. Kay Granger
tweet: FIGHTING SEX TRAFFICKING: Enacted the Fight Online Sex Trafficking Act to combat trafficking.

name: Rep. Kay Granger
tweet: VICTIMS’ RIGHTS: Passed the Justice Served Act to provide funds to prosecute cold cases solved by DNA evidence and the SAFER Act to help reduce the rape kit backlog.

name: Rep. Kay Granger
tweet: VETERANS’ BENEFITS REFORM: Delivered real reform and choice to American veterans with the VA MISSION Act. Provided the largest funding increase in history for veterans care and services, and to modernize the @DeptVetAffairs’s electronic health record system.

tweet: Congress has finally delivered on the promise of tax reform, and I am proud to have supported this historic tax bill.

name: Rep. Kay Granger
tweet: There has been a lot of mischaracterization of what this bill does, but the American people will know the truth when they start to see more money in their paychecks as early as February of next year.

name: Rep. Kay Granger
tweet: Businesses will be able to immediately write off the full cost of new equipment to improve operations and enhance the skills of their workers.

name: Rep. Kay Granger
tweet: This legislation delivers real relief to businesses by lowering the corporate tax rate to 21 percent, down from 35 percent. In fact, it reduces taxes on small businesses to the lowest they’ve been in 40 years.

name: Rep. Kay Granger
tweet: It also allows Texans to write off up to $10,000 of their property taxes.

name: Rep. Kay Granger
tweet: With this bill, the typical family of four earning the median family income of $73,000 will receive a tax cut of $2,059. The bill also expands the Child Tax Credit from $1,000 to $2,000 for single filers and married couples to help parents with the cost of raising children.

name: Rep. Kay Granger
tweet: The bill nearly doubles the standard tax deduction and reduces loopholes, while preserving important tax breaks such as the teacher tax deduction for classroom expenses.

name: Rep. Kay Granger
tweet: In addition, this legislation not only protects current American jobs but also encourages companies who have moved overseas to come home and bring jobs back to Texas.
